_note: Each model entry is either 'provider:model' (e.g. 'ollama:llama3.1' for a free local model via `ollama serve`) or a bare OpenRouter slug (e.g. 'openai/gpt-5.1') kept for backward compatibility. OpenRouter slugs drift - check https://openrouter.ai/models. debate_model drives advisors.py; it does not need to be one of council_models.
